intro.headline: Unlike most games here, Elden Ring's NPC quests ARE permanently missable.
points: Quests advance when you defeat bosses / change the world state — progress too far and an NPC vanishes or dies mid-quest, with no way back that run.
The big lock is defeating Maliketh (Crumbling Farum Azula), which turns Leyndell into the Ashen Capital and ends many quests. Finish what you can before it.
Most quests also need you to talk to the NPC again after each major step (often after resting or beating an area boss) — skip a step and the quest stalls.
Use this as a per-quest tracker. Tick a questline once you've finished it (or consciously skipped it).

sections.title: World-state triggers that lock content (clear quests first)
sections.note: These advance the story and can end NPC quests. Mop up the relevant questlines before you cross them.

items.label: Before defeating Maliketh — Leyndell becomes the Ashen Capital and many quests end here
Before burning the Erdtree / entering Crumbling Farum Azula
Choosing the Frenzied Flame is a near-point-of-no-return (only undone with Miquella's Needle)
Talk to each NPC again after every major boss / after resting — quests stall if you skip a step

sections.title: Ending-path questlines (commit before the finale)
sections.note: Each unlocks a different ending or a key item. You generally can't complete more than one of the ending-altering ones per run.

items.label: Ranni — Age of the Stars ending (Blaidd, Iji, Seluvis, Rennala, Renna's Rise)
Fia — Age of the Duskborn (Deathbed Companion, the Mending Rune)
Goldmask & Brother Corhyn — Age of Order ending
Dung Eater — Blessing of Despair (Seethewater, Deathbed Smalls)
Hyetta — Lord of the Frenzied Flame (Shabriri Grapes, the Three Fingers)

sections.title: NPC questlines (finish before progressing their region)
sections.note: None tied to endings, but all are permanently missable. Roughly in the order you meet them.

items.label: Roderika — Stormhill → Roundtable Hold (Spirit Tuning)
Nepheli Loux & Kenneth Haight — Stormveil, Fort Haight, Village of the Albinaurics
Gostoc — Stormveil gate
Iron Fist Alexander — the jar warrior, multiple regions (don't over-progress)
Sorcerer Rogier — Stormveil → Roundtable (ties into Ranni & Fia)
Yura, Bloody Finger Hunter — Nagakiba, Eleonora at Second Church of Marika
Thops — Church of Irith → Raya Lucaria (give the Academy Glintstone Key)
Gowry & Millicent — Sellia, Unalloyed Gold Needle, Haligtree (choose her or the sisters)
Latenna — Slumbering Wolf's Shack, the Haligtree Secret Medallion (Right)
Rya / Volcano Manor — Tanith's assassination requests (Rykard)
Diallos — Volcano Manor → Jarburg, and Jar-Bairn
Patches — Murkwater Cave (recurring, don't kill him)
Boc the Seamster — Coastal Cave onward (give him the Larval Tear / Sewing Needle)
Gurranq, Beast Clergyman — offer Deathroot at the Bestial Sanctum
D, Hunter of the Dead & his brother — Roundtable (conflicts with Fia)
